---
title: "123456"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
PATH <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aldosolari/ISL/refs/heads/main/data/"

time_taken <- system.time({

  # Load data
  train <- read.table(paste0(PATH, "Train_ratings_all.dat"))
  test  <- read.table(paste0(PATH, "Test_ratings_all.dat"))
  train_y <- read.table(paste0(PATH, "Train_y_rating.dat"))$V1

  # Fit intercept-only model
  fit <- lm(train_y ~ 1)

  # Predict on test set
  yhat <- predict(fit, newdata = test)
})

time_taken
```

```{r}
# Save predictions (uncomment when needed)
# write.table(yhat, "123456_prediction.txt", row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)

# Training RMSE
rmse_train <- sqrt(mean((train_y - fitted(fit))^2))
rmse_train
```
